# Loyalty multi product criteria

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:4a71f4d1e7bde4bd33d9c7f481919e15165337525f341ca4fad23189cde73476
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Base module that allows to define complex rules on products to fulfill the conditions
of a loyalty program, so for a given set of products we could define a minimum quantity
and another for others, being all those criterias mandatory for the program to be
applied.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Use Cases / Context

The functionality of the "Repeat" option that was included in this module is now included
in the rules of an odoo promotion. In this functionality a criterion was established in
which any of the products defined in the list of the criterion itself had to be in the
sales order lines in the minimum quantity established for the promotion to be applied.
This functionality can now be applied in the following way:

- Defining or editing a promotion.
- Modifying the rules to indicate a minimum quantity and selecting the products,
  either by domain, specific products, product category or tag.

This way the promotion will be applicable when any of those products are in the order l
ines and the total of all or one of them meets the minimum quantity, as it was done when
the "Repeat" option was checked.

## Configuration

To configure multiple product criterias:

1. Go to *Sales > Product > Loyalty Programs* and select or create a new one.
2. Go to rules. On the *Loyalty Criteria* field choose *Multi Product*.
3. The standard domain will be hidden and a criteria list will be shown.
4. Add as many criterias as needed for the desired promotion behavior.

In the list of criterias we can configure:

- Products: The products that should be present to fulfill the condition.

Some examples:

| Qty | Products |
| --- | -------- |
| 1   | Prod A   |

A unit of Product A must be in the sale order.

| Qty | Products       |
| --- | -------------- |
| 2   | Prod B, Prod C |

A unit of Product B and Product C must be in the sale order.

Also note that all the defined criterias must be fulfilled or the program won't be
applied.

methods.name: odoo.addons.loyalty_criteria_multi_product.models.loyalty_criteria.LoyaltyCriteria._compute_rule_min_quantity
documentation: Set the minimum quantity automatically to prevent errors

methods.name: odoo.addons.loyalty_criteria_multi_product.models.loyalty_rule.LoyaltyRule._onchange_loyalty_criteria
documentation: Clear domain so we clear some other fields from the view

functions.name: odoo.addons.loyalty_criteria_multi_product.migrations.16.0.1.0.0.post-migration._copy_multi_product_criteria
documentation:
Copy multi-product criteria to the new m2m table. Done this way for avoiding to
rename columns, indexes, FKs, etc on the old m2m table, being this table not very
big for sure.

functions.name: odoo.addons.loyalty_criteria_multi_product.migrations.16.0.1.0.0.post-migration.adapt_rules_with_repeat_product
documentation:
Adapt rules with the 'Repeat' option to new promotion rules.
The functionality of the 'Repeat' option has been integrated into the rules
of an Odoo promotion. This function adapts the existing loyalty criteria to
the new structure.
For each loyalty criterion with 'Repeat' enabled, the corresponding loyalty rule
is updated with the minimum quantity and product information. After the update,
the loyalty criterion is unlinked.

functions.name: odoo.addons.loyalty_criteria_multi_product.migrations.16.0.1.0.0.pre-migration.move_coupon_criteria_to_rule
documentation:
Move everything related to coupon.criteria from the loyalty.program model to
loyalty.rule.
